head_commit.message:
feat: add new ArceOS tests with xtask framework adaptation (#20)

* feat: add new ArceOS tests with xtask framework adaptation

Add 6 new test cases and adapt them for the xtask test framework:
- affinity: test CPU affinity for tasks
- parallel: test parallel task execution
- priority: test task priority scheduling
- sleep: test task sleep functionality
- yield: test task yielding
- memtest: test memory operations

Each test includes:
- Proper Cargo.toml with edition.workspace = true
- main.rs with unsafe(no_mangle) attribute
- Complete platform configurations (.axconfig.toml, .qemu.toml)
- Architecture-specific QEMU configs (aarch64, riscv64, x86_64, loongarch64)

All tests pass with `cargo xtask test arceos`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(arceos): add panic detection and improve test configurations for all platforms

* chore: remove obsolete test binaries and expected output files for arceos task tests

* fix: 更新 QEMU 配置文件中的 success_regex 和 fail_regex

* fix: 更新各平台的成功正则表达式以反映测试结果

* fix: 更新各任务的成功和失败正则表达式以统一测试结果

* fix: 更新成功和失败正则表达式以统一测试结果

* fix: 更新各任务的成功正则表达式以反映测试结果

* fix: 更新依赖项版本并添加获取可用逻辑 CPU 数量的 API

* fix: 优化 QEMU 运行逻辑以支持可选的配置路径

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
